zh.lifeSummary: 當The elder John Sydenham於1420年出生在英國薩默塞特布普頓時，他的父親Walter Sydenham20歲，母親Margery Whyton24歲。他和Joan Stourton至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1468年4月4日在英國英格蘭波克夏布利普頓享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当The elder John Sydenham于1420年出生在英国薩默塞特布普頓时，他的父亲Walter Sydenham20岁，母亲Margery Whyton24岁。他和Joan Stourton至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1468年4月4日在英国英格兰波克夏布利普頓享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特布普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Sydenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sydenham in Bridgwater (Somerset), Sydenham Damerel (Devon), and Sydenham (Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When The elder John Sydenham was born in 1420, in Brympton, Somerset, England, his father, Walter Sydenham, was 20 and his mother, Margery Whyton, was 24. He had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Joan Stourton. He died on 4 April 1468, in Brimpton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque The elder John Sydenham est né en 1420, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Walter Sydenham, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margery Whyton, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Joan Stourton. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1468, à Brimpton, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als The elder John Sydenham 1420 in Brympton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Sydenham 20 und seine Mutter Margery Whyton 24. Er hatte mit Joan Stourton mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 4. April 1468 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Brimpton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando The elder John Sydenham è nato il nel 1420 nel Brympton, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Walter Sydenham, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Margery Whyton, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Joan Stourton. Morì il 4 aprile 1468, nel Brimpton, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Brympton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: The elder John Sydenhamが1420年にイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンで生まれた時，父Walter Sydenhamは20歳，母Margery Whytonは24歳であった。彼はJoan Stourtonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1468年4月4日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアブリンプトンで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: The elder John Sydenham(이)가 1420년 영국 서머세트 브리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Sydenham(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Whyton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Joan Stourton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1468년 4월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 브림프턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브리프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando The elder John Sydenham nasceu em 1420, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Sydenham, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margery Whyton, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Joan Stourton. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1468, em Brimpton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда The elder John Sydenham родился в 1420 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Sydenham было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Whyton, 24. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Joan Stourton. Он умер 4 апреля 1468 г. в местности бримптон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando The elder John Sydenham nació en 1420, en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Sydenham, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margery Whyton, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Joan Stourton. Murió el 4 de abril de 1468, en Brimpton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
